title: ageratina sotarensis
intro: Ageratina sotarensis, also known as Sotarensis, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ageratina sotarensis include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Ageratina sotarensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
